stories.title: Virtual Joystick Movement
stories.description: Implement touch-based virtual joystick for 8-directional player movement at configurable speed

stories.title: Game State Machine
stories.description: Implement menu/playing/dead/win state transitions controlled by room events

stories.title: Player HP and Stamina
stories.description: Player has 100 HP and 100 Stamina. HP decreases on enemy hit, stamina regenerates over time

stories.title: Room Manager
stories.description: Generates 3 random rooms + 1 Boss room. Tracks room progress. Handles room transitions.

stories.title: Three-Hit Combo Attack
stories.description: Player attacks with three consecutive hits on repeated tap. Each hit has damage, knockback, and animation

stories.title: Dodge with i-frames
stories.description: Player dodges in movement direction, costs 20 stamina, grants 0.3s invincibility frames

stories.title: Stamina Regeneration
stories.description: Stamina regenerates 10 per second when not dodging. Cannot dodge when stamina < 20

stories.title: 剑气斩 — Melee AOE
stories.description: Active skill: forward fan-shaped melee attack. 5s cooldown. 30 damage. Unlocked from skill pool.

stories.title: 飞燕回翔 — Dash Attack
stories.description: Active skill: dash forward through enemies. 4s cooldown. 15 damage. Grants i-frames during dash.

stories.title: 冰魄掌 — Ranged Ice
stories.description: Active skill: fire ice projectile. 6s cooldown. 25 damage. Knocks back enemies.

stories.title: 御风步 — Blink
stories.description: Active skill: short-distance teleport. 3s cooldown. 10 damage. I-frames on arrival.

stories.title: 破军 — Screen Nuke
stories.description: Active skill: charge then release screen-wide damage. 15s cooldown. 50 damage.

stories.title: Passive Effects
stories.description: 5 passives: 血战 (low HP = more damage), 铁壁 (10% damage reduction), 连斩 (kill streak = attack speed), 吸血 (5% lifesteal), 疾风 (15% move speed)

stories.title: Melee Enemy AI
stories.description: Sword enemy: chases player, deals contact damage (20), has 30 HP. Dies in 2 player hits.

stories.title: Ranged Enemy AI
stories.description: Archer enemy: keeps distance, shoots arrow every 2s (15 damage), has 20 HP. Dies in 1 player hit.

stories.title: Boss AI
stories.description: Boss: 300 HP. Three attack patterns: charge (40 damage), ground slam (AoE 30 damage), summon minions (2 melee). 30% faster after 50% HP.

stories.title: HUD — Health and Stamina Bars
stories.description: Top of screen: health bar (green→yellow→red), stamina bar (blue). Room progress dots (4 slots).

stories.title: Virtual Joystick
stories.description: Bottom-left: virtual joystick. Drag from center to move. Semi-transparent. Responsive touch.

stories.title: Damage Numbers and Effects
stories.description: Floating damage numbers on hit. Screen shake on player damage. Red flash on low HP.

stories.title: Game Over and Victory
stories.description: Death screen: 'You Died' + 'Retry' button. Victory screen: 'Victory' + 'Play Again' button.
